title: Session 17 pipeline parameters
description: Word count pipeline demonstrating nf-schema input validation.

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

input.description: Path to comma-separated samplesheet with sample information.
input.help_text: The samplesheet must be a CSV or TSV file with the following columns: sample, data_file, condition, replicate. See assets/schema_input.json for the full specification.

outdir.description: The output directory where results will be saved.

processing_options.title: Processing options
processing_options.description: Options that control how the pipeline processes data.

suffix.errorMessage: Suffix may only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.
suffix.description: Suffix string appended to the output summary filename.
suffix.help_text: Only letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens are allowed.

min_word_length.description: Minimum word length to count. Words shorter than this are excluded.

condition_filter.description: Process only samples with this condition, or 'all' for no filter.

email.description: Email address for pipeline completion notification.
email.help_text: Set this to receive notification when the pipeline finishes.
